tuya.description: Connect your Tuya smart home devices by logging in with your Tuya account.

login.title: Sign in to Tuya
login.description: Enter your Tuya account credentials to connect your smart home devices.
login.descriptionRtsp: Login with your Tuya account to get RTSP video streams from cameras.
login.overseasNote: Only accounts registered with the overseas Tuya Smart app are supported. Accounts from the Chinese Tuya app cannot be used.
login.error: Login failed. Please check your credentials.

token.title: Connect with Token
token.description: Enter your Tuya access token to connect your smart home devices.

status.loggedInDesc: Your Tuya account is connected. You can now control your smart home devices.
status.tokenDesc: Your Tuya account is connected via token. You can now control your smart home devices.

field.usernamePlaceholder: Enter your Tuya account email or phone

xiaomi.description: Connect your Xiaomi smart home devices by logging in with your Mi account.

login.title: Sign in to Mi Account
login.description: Enter your Xiaomi account credentials to connect your smart home devices.

captcha.title: Captcha Verification
captcha.description: Please enter the captcha code shown in the image.

verify.title: Security Verification
verify.descriptionPhone: A verification code has been sent to your phone {{target}}.
verify.descriptionEmail: A verification code has been sent to your email {{target}}.

status.loggedInDesc: Your Xiaomi account is connected. You can now control your smart home devices.

field.usernamePlaceholder: Enter your Mi account email or phone

go2rtc.title: Video Control
go2rtc.description: Manage the go2rtc video streaming service. Start, stop, or restart the service below.

service.title: go2rtc Service
service.desc: Real-time video streaming service for cameras and RTSP streams.

apple.description: Discover and pair Apple HomeKit devices on your network. All HomeKit-enabled devices will be automatically detected.

unpaired.title: Available Devices
unpaired.empty: No unpaired devices found. Make sure your HomeKit devices are in pairing mode.

paired.title: Paired Devices
paired.empty: No paired devices yet. Select a device from the available devices to pair.

pair.title: Pair HomeKit Device
pair.description: Enter the HomeKit setup code for {{name}}. This is usually an 8-digit code found on the device.

validation.pinRequired: Please enter the HomeKit setup code.

device_control_page.noDevices: You don't have any devices yet. Please add devices first.

home_section.title: Family Information
home_section.noHomes: No families found. Please sync to fetch your homes.
home_section.confirmHomeChange: Changing the selected home will re-sync devices. Continue?

device_section.title: Device List
device_section.noDevices: No devices found. Please sync to fetch your devices.
device_section.selectHomeFirst: Please select a home first to view devices.
